name: Role
description: Role schema from Axway Amplify Platform API

client.description: Whether the role can be assigned to a client.

consumer.description: Whether the role is assignable on consumer org members (bypassing all other requirements for role).

disabled.description: Indicates the role is deprecated and no longer assignable

entitlement.description: Entitlement which must be active to allow the role.

order.description: Indicates the relative access rights for the role. The lower the value, the more access the role has.

org.description: Whether the role can be assigned as a org-level role.

partner.description: Product name key for service to which a "service role" applies.

platform_restricted.description: Whether the user has limited platform visibility and capabilities

product.description: Partner that must be provisioned and have an active entitlement for to allow the role.

required_default_roles.description: Org-level default roles a user must be assigned in order to allow the service role.

subscription.description: Subscriptions for which one or more of is required to allow the role.

team.description: Whether the role can be assigned as a team-level role.

web_only.description: Indicates that users with the role are only able to access the platform in web contexts.
